subcodes.first_line: The demons of utterance have indeed betrayed the Cause of their Lord, the All-Merciful, and schemed until the fire of sedition was kindled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد غدر شیاطین البیان فی امر ربهم الرحمن و احتالوا الی ان اشتعلت نار الافتتان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @predictions and prophecies, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment
